summary: M313 — Consistency + codex + What's New fix: removed Recommend/Auto bar from skill tabs, 'Show Base Attributes' label rename, hidden useless skill-header bar, removed 'Skills - ' prefix, shop+craft auto-equip toasts (matching combat-loot variant), salvage button margin, 3-step enchanter wizard (item→property→tier), What's New fetch + Full History link now use Vite BASE_URL, codex updated with current formulas (armor DR curve, crit, dodge, fame thresholds, boss phases, champion modifiers, legendary activation rules).
